message:
🌱 Add kubearmor: Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube mission (#1075)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubearmor-756-minikube-start-is-failing-with-latest-version-of-minikube-1-26-and",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubearmor: Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube (1.26) and k8s(1.24)",
+    "description": "Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube (1.26) and k8s(1.24). Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubearmor troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubearmor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor -n kubearmor --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubearmor configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubearmor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor\nkubectl get configmap -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubearmor\n```\n## Minikube start\n\n**General Information**\n\n- Environment (minikube)\n- Kernel version (Linux eswar-LEGION 5.13.0-52-generic #59~20.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Thu Jun 16 21:21:28 UTC 2022 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux)\n\n**To Reproduce**\n\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube…",
+        "description": "I tried using latest version of minikube with virtualbox driver. I was able to get past initial iso installation and the VM booted up fine. The problem was kubearmor was not starting up due to volume mount paths issue. Also minikube VM does not seem to have certain file paths\n```yaml\nNAMESPACE     NAME                                             READY   STATUS              RESTARTS     AGE\nkube-system   coredns-6d4b75cb6d-fsg6n                         1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   etcd-minikube                                    1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-apiserver-minikube                          1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-controller-manager-minikube                 1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-proxy-4tz7h                              \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kubearmor to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kubearmor:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kubearmor kubearmor/kubearmor --namespace kubearmor\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubearmor\nhelm list -n kubearmor\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Minikube Start is failing with latest version of… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor -n kubearmor --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubearmor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I tried using latest version of minikube with virtualbox driver. I was able to get past initial iso installation and the VM booted up fine. The problem was kubearmor was not starting up due to volume mount paths issue. Also minikube VM does not seem to have certain file paths (`/sys/kernel/security/lsms`) that kubearmor expects to have.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "NAMESPACE     NAME                                             READY   STATUS              RESTARTS     AGE\nkube-system   coredns-6d4b75cb6d-fsg6n                         1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   etcd-minikube                                    1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-apiserver-minikube                          1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-controller-manager-minikube                 1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-proxy-4tz7h                                 1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kube-scheduler-minikube                          1/1     Running             0            57m\nkube-system   kubearmor-annotation-manager-8",
+        "minikube version: v1.26.0\ncommit: f4b412861bb746be73053c9f6d2895f12cf78565",
+        "kube-system   kubearmor-vwrgl                        0/1     Init:CrashLoopBackOff   6 (4m30s ago)   11m"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
